config.name: Inequality Threshold: When Does Redistribution Help?
config.hypothesis: A Gini wealth tax threshold between 0.35-0.50 optimizes both population stability and mean fitness, while extremes (too aggressive or too passive) reduce long-term outcomes

findings: Optimal population stability at gini_threshold = 0.70 (mean pop: 49.4)
Gini: 0.5472 at aggressive threshold (0.20) vs 0.7201 at laissez-faire (0.90)
Mean fitness: 0.5431 at aggressive redistribution vs 0.5490 at laissez-faire
Treasury ratio: 0.0045 at threshold 0.20 vs 0.0008 at threshold 0.90
